maps.title: MAP: Be Bank of India (Rural
maps.objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - credit information reporting) directions, 2025

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be Bank of India (Rural
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be Bank of India (Rural'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Credit Information Reporting) Directions, 2025.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Be Bank of India (Rural
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - credit information reporting) directions, 2025. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Bank of India (Rural
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Bank of India (Rural'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be Bank of India (Rural
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be Bank of India (Rural' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be Bank of India (Rural
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be Bank of India (Rural'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: Deviations from
stipulated time limits shall be monitored and commented upon in the periodical
reports/reviews put up to the Board / Committee of Board on customer service.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Be upon in the periodical
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be monitored and commented upon in the periodical reports/reviews put up to the board / committee of board on customer service. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be upon in the periodical
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be upon in the periodical'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be upon in the periodical
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be upon in the periodical' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be upon in the periodical
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be upon in the periodical'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be CI by the SHG
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be CI by the SHG'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes: Review control description: 30,000 or where the actual amount disbursed exceeded Rs.30000 though not agreed at the time of taking loan from the CI, must be reported to the CI by the SHG office bearers.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Be CI by the SHG
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the ci by the shg office bearers. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be CI by the SHG
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be CI by the SHG'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be CI by the SHG
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be CI by the SHG' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be CI by the SHG
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be CI by the SHG'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
